content: Two paper citations support that the corpus discusses LEO beamforming as both narrow-beam communication and integrated communication/navigation design.

citations.title: Space-Time Beamforming for LEO Satellite Communications
citations.quote: Space-time beamforming is studied for narrow LEO satellite communication beams.

citations.title: Joint Beamforming Design and Satellite Selection for Integrated Communication and Navigation in LEO Satellite Networks
citations.quote: Beamforming design and satellite selection are studied for integrated communication and navigation in LEO satellite networks.

claims.claim_text: The first citation supports narrow-beam LEO communication.

cited_evidence.quote: Space-time beamforming is studied for narrow LEO satellite communication beams.

claims.claim_text: The second citation supports integrated communication/navigation beamforming.

cited_evidence.quote: Beamforming design and satellite selection are studied for integrated communication and navigation in LEO satellite networks.
